createsApplied.title: Unified Engine: alt-misuse — Elements other than image (Tag: IMG) should not have alt attribute
Unified Engine: aria-controls-has-reference — aria-controls should reference a valid element id
Unified Engine: aria-describedby-has-reference — aria-describedby should reference a valid element id
Unified Engine: aria-invalid-mismatch — Form fields should indicate validation errors to assistive technology
Unified Engine: aria-invalid-misuse — Only input fields with validation errors should be assigned aria-invalid="true"
Unified Engine: background-image-discernible — background-image-discernible
Unified Engine: background-image-discernible-image — Functional image displayed using CSS background properties should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: breadcrumbs-nav — breadcrumbs-nav
Unified Engine: broken-aria-reference — broken-aria-reference
Unified Engine: button-discernible — Buttons should have a label
Unified Engine: captcha-accessible-provider-2.0 — captcha-accessible-provider-2.0
Unified Engine: captcha-accessible-provider-2.2 — captcha-accessible-provider-2.2
Unified Engine: carousel-discernible — Carousels should have a descriptive label
Unified Engine: carousel-dragging-movements — Carousels that require dragging movements should provide alternative methods of operation with a single pointer
Unified Engine: carousel-mismatch — Carousels should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: carousel-next-slide-discernible — Carousel navigation next arrow should be labelled for assistive technology
Unified Engine: carousel-next-slide-discernible-correctly — Carousel Next pagination control should have an accurate and descriptive label
Unified Engine: carousel-previous-slide-discernible — Carousel navigation previous arrows should be labelled for assistive technology
Unified Engine: carousel-previous-slide-discernible-correctly — Carousel Previous pagination control should have an accurate and descriptive label
Unified Engine: carousel-redundant-discernible-text — Carousels should be labelled properly without redundancy
Unified Engine: checkbox-aria-checked — Checked state of custom checkbox controls should be exposed to assistive technology
Unified Engine: checkbox-discernible — Checkbox controls should have a label
Unified Engine: checkbox-mismatch — Custom checkbox controls should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: checkbox-misuse — Only elements that function as checkbox controls should receive role="checkbox"
Unified Engine: color-contrast — color-contrast
Unified Engine: control-field-visible-and-tabbable — Custom checkboxes, radio buttons and file upload fields should be accessible to assistive technology
Unified Engine: custom-select-options-list-listbox — Custom select options lists should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: custom-select-trigger-combobox — Custom select triggers should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: dialog-modal-focus — Keyboard focus should move into and lock inside active dialogs
Unified Engine: dialog-modal-mismatch — Modal dialogs should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: dialog-modal-misuse — Only elements that function as dialogs should be tagged as dialog
Unified Engine: duplicate-id — The id attribute should have a unique value
Unified Engine: emphasis-mismatch — Emphasis should be tagged properly for assistive technology
Unified Engine: figure-discernible — Figure elements should receive text description or lose figure role
Unified Engine: focus-not-obscured-footer — Focused elements should not be obscured by a sticky footer
Unified Engine: focus-not-obscured-header — Focused elements should not be obscured by a sticky header
Unified Engine: focus-noticeable — Focused elements should not be obscured by a sticky header
Unified Engine: font-sizes — font-sizes
Unified Engine: footer-navigation-discernible — Footer navigation should be labelled properly
Unified Engine: form-context-change-warning — Interacting with form controls should not cause a change in context unless a user is notified beforehand
Unified Engine: form-duplicate-id — Forms and form fields must have unique ID attributes
Unified Engine: form-mismatch — A container of input elements should be tagged as a form
Unified Engine: form-submit-button-mismatch — Form submission controls should have type="submit"
Unified Engine: header-navigation-discernible — Header navigation should be labelled properly
Unified Engine: heading-h1 — Each page should have a main heading
Unified Engine: heading-mismatch — Headings should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: heading-misuse — Only elements that function as headings should be tagged as heading
Unified Engine: heading-order — Heading levels should follow a logical hierarchy
Unified Engine: heading-order-optimal — Heading levels should reflect the structure of the content
Unified Engine: heading-single-h1 — A page should not have more than one main heading
Unified Engine: html-lang — Default page language should be defined
Unified Engine: html-lang-valid — HTML lang attribute should have a valid value
Unified Engine: icon-discernible — Meaningful icons should have a label, while decorative icons should be hidden
Unified Engine: image-discernible — Functional images should have a text alternative
Unified Engine: image-discernible-correctly — Functional images should have an informative and accurate text alternative
Unified Engine: image-mismatch — Images should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: image-misuse — Only elements that function as images should be tagged as image
Unified Engine: inner-content-navigation-discernible — Inner content navigation should be labelled properly
Unified Engine: input-discernible — Input controls should have a descriptive label
Unified Engine: interactive-not-tabbable — Interactive elements should be keyboard navigable
Unified Engine: interactive-target-size — Targets for interactive elements should meet a minimum size (at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels) or have enough spacing around them
Unified Engine: letter-spacing-positive — Letter spacing should scale to at least 0.12 times the font size without loss of content or functionality
Unified Engine: link-anchor-ambiguous — Ambiguous links should have additional descriptions for screen readers.
Unified Engine: link-anchor-discernible — Anchor links should have a descriptive label
Unified Engine: link-context — Links should indicate their functionality and destination to assistive technology
Unified Engine: link-current-page — Visual indication that a link's destination is the current page should be announced by screen readers
Unified Engine: link-homepage-warning — Warning a user that a link navigates to the homepage is recommended
Unified Engine: link-image-warning — Warning a user when a link triggers an image to open is recommended
Unified Engine: link-mailto-warning — Warning a user when a link triggers a mail application is recommended
Unified Engine: link-mismatch — Links should be tagged properly
Unified Engine: link-navigation-ambiguous — Link context should be exposed to assistive technology
Unified Engine: link-navigation-discernible — Navigation links should have a descriptive label
Unified Engine: link-new-window-warning — Warning a user when a link triggers a new browser window is recommended
Unified Engine: link-pdf-warning — Warning a user when a link triggers a PDF file is recommended
Unified Engine: link-telephone-warning — Warning a user when a link triggers a phone application is recommended
Unified Engine: list-item-misuse — list-item-misuse
Unified Engine: list-not-empty — Lists should contain at least one list item
Unified Engine: main-navigation-discernible — Main navigation should be labelled properly
Unified Engine: main-navigation-mismatch — Main navigation should have role navigation
Unified Engine: map-area-discernible — Each area element within an image map should have a text alternative
Unified Engine: marquee-deprecated — <marquee> elements are deprecated
Unified Engine: menu-avoid — Avoid using role="menu" for web navigation links
Unified Engine: menu-bar-avoid — Avoid using role="menubar" for web navigation links
Unified Engine: menu-item-avoid — Avoid using role="menuitem" for web navigation links
Unified Engine: menu-trigger-mismatch — Menu trigger buttons/links should be tagged properly
Unified Engine: menu-trigger-misuse — Elements that do not expand additional content should not receive trigger attributes
Unified Engine: navigation-mismatch — A list of navigation links is not contained in a navigation landmark
Unified Engine: navigation-not-nested — Avoid using nested navigation structure
Unified Engine: navigation-redundant-discernible-text — navigation-redundant-discernible-text
Unified Engine: no-extra-information-in-title — The title attribute should not be the only method used to provide information
Unified Engine: no-ui-slider-single-pointer — A slider should be operated with a single pointer
Unified Engine: page-meta-description — Page has a meta description
Unified Engine: page-meta-viewport — page-meta-viewport
Unified Engine: page-no-meta-http-equiv-refresh — Pages should not use <meta http-equiv="refresh"> for automatic redirection or reloading
Unified Engine: page-title-valid — Page title should be descriptive
Unified Engine: pixel-image-not-discernible — Pixels should be hidden from assistive technology
Unified Engine: popup-focus — Keyboard focus should move into and lock inside active dialogs
Unified Engine: radio-aria-checked — Checked state of custom radio controls should be indicated to assistive technology
Unified Engine: radio-discernible — Radio controls should have a label
Unified Engine: radio-mismatch — Custom radio controls should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: radio-misuse — Only elements that function as radio controls should receive role="radio"
Unified Engine: redundant-discernible-content — Assigned label should not be redundant
Unified Engine: region-footer-mismatch — Global site information that appears at the end of each page is contained in a contentinfo landmark (footer)
Unified Engine: region-footer-misuse — An element without global site information is tagged as a contentinfo landmark
Unified Engine: region-footer-single — Each page should include at most one global contentinfo landmark (footer)
Unified Engine: region-main-content — Each web page that uses landmark regions should have a main landmark
Unified Engine: region-main-content-mismatch — All of the main content on the page is contained in the main landmark
Unified Engine: region-main-content-misuse — An element without main content is tagged as a main landmark
Unified Engine: region-main-content-single — Each page should include at most one main landmark
Unified Engine: region-main-navigation-mismatch — region-main-navigation-mismatch
Unified Engine: sale-price-discernible — Original and discounted prices should be indicated to assistive technology
Unified Engine: search-input-dynamic-results-announcement — search-input-dynamic-results-announcement
Unified Engine: select-option-mismatch — Custom select options should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: select-option-misuse — Only elements that function as select options should be tagged as option
Unified Engine: skip-link-first — Skip links should be the first elements on a page
Unified Engine: slider-dragging-movements — Sliders requiring dragging movements must offer alternative single-pointer operation methods
Unified Engine: sr-hidden-tabbable — Hidden elements should not be keyboard navigable
Unified Engine: strong-mismatch — Strong should be tagged properly for assistive technology
Unified Engine: svg-discernible — SVG discernible
Unified Engine: tab-list-mismatch — Tablists should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: tab-list-misuse — Only elements that function as tablists should receive role="tablist"
Unified Engine: tab-mismatch — Tab controls should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: tab-misuse — Only elements that function as tabs should receive role="tab"
Unified Engine: tab-panel-mismatch — Tab panels should be tagged for assistive technology
Unified Engine: tab-panel-misuse — Only elements that function as tab panels should receive role="tabpanel"
Unified Engine: tabbable-non-interactive — Non-interactive elements should not be keyboard navigable
Unified Engine: tabbable-visible — Use the tabindex attribute correctly to manage focus for visible and hidden interactive elements
Unified Engine: tabindex-valid — The tabindex attribute should be assigned a valid value
Unified Engine: table-header-not-empty — table-header-not-empty
Unified Engine: table-headers — Tables should include table header tags
Unified Engine: table-not-nested — Tables should not be nested
Unified Engine: text-spacing-line-height — Line height should scale to at least 1.5 times the font size without loss of content or functionality
Unified Engine: text-spacing-paragraph-spacing — text-spacing-paragraph-spacing
Unified Engine: text-spacing-word-spacing — Word spacing should scale to at least 0.16 times the font size without loss of content or functionality
Unified Engine: toggle-button-correct-state — The state of toggle buttons should be accurate
Unified Engine: toggle-button-mismatch — Toggle buttons should expose their state to assistive technology
Unified Engine: toggle-button-misuse — Only elements that function as toggle buttons should be assigned the aria-pressed attribute
Unified Engine: user-rating-discernible — User ratings should be tagged and labeled for assistive technology
Unified Engine: visibility-mismatch — Visible content should not be hidden from assistive technology
Unified Engine: visible-text-part-of-accessible-name — visible-text-part-of-accessible-name
